Created attachment 213167
1.8.3 to 1.10.1 update patch

This patch updates Qutebrowser from v1.8.3 to v1.10.1

The changelogs for the following version updates are as follows:
https://github.com/qutebrowser/qutebrowser/releases/tag/v1.9.0
https://github.com/qutebrowser/qutebrowser/releases/tag/v1.10.0
https://github.com/qutebrowser/qutebrowser/releases/tag/v1.10.1
